Container.Name: PlexPosterHelper-Scheduler
Container.Overview: Optional headless scheduler for Plex Poster Helper - no window, no web UI. The GUI container already runs your schedules 24/7; add this only if you want a lighter, desktop-free runner. Point /config at the SAME path as the PlexPosterHelper (GUI) container and it automatically reuses the Plex sign-in and the schedules you built in the GUI. Build the image first from the cloned repo: docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.headless -t plex-poster-helper:headless .
Container.Description: Optional headless scheduler companion to PlexPosterHelper. Shares the GUI's /config so your Plex sign-in and schedules carry over automatically.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Must match the GUI container's Config path - that's how the scheduler picks up your Plex sign-in and schedules automatically

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone - schedule times fire in this zone

Config.Name: PLEX_BASEURL
Config.Description: Optional override (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400). Leave empty when sharing /config with the GUI

Config.Name: PLEX_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional override. Leave empty when sharing /config with the GUI
